name: Arlington Public Schools
districtFact: Arlington Public Schools serves students in Arlington County, Virginia, with calendars that are closely watched by Northern Virginia and Washington, DC-area families.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Arlington Families
content: Use the APS school year calendar for districtwide holidays, no-school days, early release days, quarter dates, and the separate PreK/VPI start date.
Check whether an early release applies to all students, elementary students, elementary and middle school students, or high school students before arranging pickup or childcare.
Use the separate high school block schedule file when APS publishes block-specific dates, and confirm school-level activities through the assigned school.

compareIntro: Compare the APS school year calendar with nearby Northern Virginia district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Arlington Public Schools calendar should families use?
districtFaqs.a: Most families should use the APS school year calendar shown on this page for districtwide holidays, no-school days, early release days, quarter dates, and the PreK/VPI start date. High school block schedule details may be published in a separate APS calendar.

districtFaqs.q: Can Arlington Public Schools calendar dates change after approval?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. Weather, school board decisions, or operational needs can affect the calendar. Families should check the official APS calendar page and school announcements before making critical plans.

districtFaqs.q: Do APS early release days apply to every grade level?
districtFaqs.a: Not always. APS identifies some early release dates as districtwide, some as elementary-only, some as elementary/middle, and some as high school early release. The event names on this page keep those grade-level distinctions when the official calendar lists them.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute APS changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Arlington Public Schools calendar page and school-level announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with APS.
